title: veronica serpyllifolia var. nummulariifolia
intro: Veronica serpyllifolia var. nummulariifolia, also known as the 'pennywort cranesbill', is a variety of the prostrate, spreading Veronica serpyllifolia species, which belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues such as diarrhea, and its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Veronica serpyllifolia var. nummulariifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
